heading: Management of health care: information regarding health-plan contracts
label: 1705A Management of health care: information regarding health-plan contracts

children.text: Any individual who seeks hospital care or medical services under this chapter shall provide to the Secretary such current information as the Secretary may require to identify any health-plan contract under which such individual is covered.

children.label: A
children.text: The name of the entity providing coverage under the health-plan contract.

children.label: B
children.text: If coverage under the health-plan contract is in the name of an individual other than the individual required to provide information under this section, the name of the policy holder of the health-plan contract.

children.label: C
children.text: The identification number for the health-plan contract.

children.label: D
children.text: The group code for the health-plan contract.

children.heading: .—Action To Collect Information
children.label: b .—Action To Collect Information
children.text: The Secretary may take such action as the Secretary considers appropriate to collect the information required under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Effect on Services From Department
children.label: c .—Effect on Services From Department
children.text: The Secretary may not deny any services under this chapter to an individual solely due to the fact that the individual fails to provide information required under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Health-Plan Contract Defined
children.label: d .—Health-Plan Contract Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “health-plan contract” has the meaning given that term in .section 1725(h) of this title
